realTimeArticles.message: Real-time news data is only available on paid plans. Free plan has a 12-hour delay. Upgrade your plan here to remove the delay: https://gnews.io/change-plan

historicalArticles.message: 1 article was removed from the response because historical data beyond 30 days is only available on paid plans. Upgrade your plan here to access historical data: https://gnews.io/change-plan
